title: How long are you going to wait for 30
display_title: How long are you going to wait for 30
wikitext:
[]: How long are you going to wait for 3.0? Post by Grimmjow » Tue Jan 01, 2013 5:17 pm Just out of curiosity, when do you guys plan to take the Q tang plunge and watch the movie? Will you wait until: a complete camrip is released the Japanese DVD is released and it is uploaded until the Funi DVD comes out. Note: I'm not asking for any links. Don't break the rules. I'm just curious as to how long you all plan to wait to see Q. As for myself, I'll probably break down in a storm of tears and Doritos as I partake of a horrific camrip.

[]: Post by A.T. Fish » Tue Jan 01, 2013 5:22 pm No sense in torturing myself longer than needed, camrip it is.

[]: Post by Grimmjow » Tue Jan 01, 2013 5:28 pm A.T. Fish wrote: No sense in torturing myself longer than needed, camrip it is.

[]: Post by TMBounty_Hunter » Tue Jan 01, 2013 5:31 pm DVD? What is this 1996? And where's the option to buy? I'm preordering the Japanese BD from Amazon as soon as the page goes up.

[]: Post by Grimmjow » Tue Jan 01, 2013 5:36 pm Not everyone has a PS3 or regular blue ray player.

[]: Post by Mr. Tines » Tue Jan 01, 2013 5:41 pm I'll wait until Final comes out as home video in this country; and only then if it wraps the series up in a way that excuses what's become of it since the end of Operation Yashima in the new continuity. I likened it to bad fan-fic nearly five years ago ; and I'm still waiting to be proven wrong.

[]: Post by TMBounty_Hunter » Tue Jan 01, 2013 5:56 pm Grimmjow wrote: Not everyone has a PS3 or regular blue ray player.

[]: Post by A.T. Fish » Tue Jan 01, 2013 6:01 pm Well, when it comes to animation the jump in quality from DVD to BD is not as significant as it is for live action footage, at least to me.

[]: Post by MitsumuraKun51196 » Tue Jan 01, 2013 6:04 pm Come on, If I can camrip because my computer can only load so many videos and replay them so many times untill my graphics card acts up. Because this is a laptop and it was made almost 11 years ago so if I can download it on PS3 I will take that chance.

[]: Post by Fireball » Tue Jan 01, 2013 6:04 pm Japanese BD release

[]: Post by Nuclear Lunchbox » Tue Jan 01, 2013 6:25 pm Theater camrips are distasteful. I'm waiting until it gets ripped from the Japanese DVD, subbed, and posted.

[]: Post by riffraff11235 » Tue Jan 01, 2013 7:00 pm I would like to go for broke and wait for a DVD/BD rip, but I'll probably end up caving once the camrip comes out. I'll probably end up checking the first seven minutes of whatever camrip comes out. I'll consider watching the whole thing if the quality isn't too horrendous.

[]: Post by Reichu » Tue Jan 01, 2013 7:52 pm No wait. I'm watching all of the shitty camripped clips as they come out. Like TMB, I'll be preordering the Japanese BD as soon as it's available. Nuclear Lunchbox : Distasteful, yes, but voyeuristically enticing. A.T. Fish : They frequently take advantage of that additional resolution to put more actual detail on the screen. Some of it could, hypothetically, be of narrative importance, as well. The danger of this rises as time goes by, and creators take it more and more for granted that their audience will have HD viewing equipment at home.

[]: Post by Evanut » Tue Jan 01, 2013 7:53 pm If a camrip finally appears I will definitely watch it. The only camrip I ever bothered watching was that of 2.0 and even in that format it was one of the most visually amazing things I've ever seen (watched Avatar in 3d after that it didn't quite match up to it, lol).

[]: Post by A.T. Fish » Tue Jan 01, 2013 8:17 pm Reichu wrote: They frequently take advantage of that additional resolution to put more actual detail on the screen. Some of it could, hypothetically, be of narrative importance, as well. The danger of this rises as time goes by, and creators take it more and more for granted that their audience will have HD viewing equipment at home.

[]: Post by Stan » Tue Jan 01, 2013 8:37 pm Camrip, then buying Jap BD, then Buying Funi BD :P

[]: Post by icomeanon4 » Tue Jan 01, 2013 9:28 pm For the last two, I went with the first DVD fansubs, and checked out parts of the 2.0 camrips. This time, though, I'm in it for the long haul. Legit Funi theatrical presentation or BD, no downloads of any sort. It'll be tough, but school's going to be keeping me so busy over the next several years that I doubt I'll care. And besides, there's always the Funi release of Hosoda's Wolf Children and the end of Gundam Unicorn to tide me over. :)

[]: Post by Redtophat » Tue Jan 01, 2013 9:44 pm Camrip, then i'll watch the blu ray/DVD rip whenever that comes out, the quality and subs will make it a new experience for me.

[]: Post by Reichu » Tue Jan 01, 2013 10:02 pm A.T. Fish wrote: Interesting. Is that the case with the Rebuild BDs? Do they have extra details, even if just aesthetical ones?

[]: Post by cyharding » Tue Jan 01, 2013 11:48 pm If the Japanese BD has english subtitles, I might consider getting it (though the odds of that happening are not that good). Otherwise, I have to wait for the US BD.
